title: Meret
description: Music override areas for mapmakers. Powered by Area Lib.
body:
Soundtrack areas for mapmakers.
Maintained for use at ModFest events.
Requires Area Lib.
--- Usage: - `/meret set` - set the music for an area to a specific sound. jukebox tag compatible - `/meret clear` - remove the music override for an area Config (`config/meret.toml`): - `overrideAll` - prevent standard situational music from playing in-game (menu music will still play) --- This mod was originally created by hama and Tomate as part of [ModFest 1.21](https://modfest.net/1.21).
Feel free to contribute bugfixes and improvements!
